summary: RR0-PRODUCTION-FIXTURE-NOOP-AUDIT-001 is CLOSED after independent QA R2 ACCEPT, both required PR checks passed, and PR #245 entered origin/main at 4723351085856a44f726ba5472481873ad62e8eb. RR0-STATUS-LEDGER-COMPACTION-001 is the next READY R0 task.

tests_run.result: PR #245 is MERGED with merge commit 47233510; Quality/Web/Browser Smoke and Windows Desktop Smoke Artifact both concluded SUCCESS.
Accepted branch head is an ancestor of origin/main.
Retained M7 renderer worktree still has exactly 20 pre-existing status entries.

decisions.decision: Close the audit only after independent QA R2 acceptance, required CI success, and origin/main integration.
Set RR0-STATUS-LEDGER-COMPACTION-001 to READY and reuse the controlled RR0 worktree rather than creating another worktree.

risks.summary: The normal Web/Electron product path still lacks production Worker, command, query, authoritative save/load, and time-control wiring; R1 remains frozen until R0 Gate passes.

requested_action: Integrate this closure checkpoint, then start RR0-STATUS-LEDGER-COMPACTION-001 in the same controlled RR0 worktree.
